title: Inside Saudi Arabia's AI Ambition: Tareq Amin on Building a New Tech Superpower
description:
(0:00) Introducing Tareq Amin

(0:39) Saudi Arabia's evolution, Humain's business

(8:11) How Humain works with foundational model providers

(13:14) Saudi's energy and talent advantages, the AI race in the Middle East

(18:11) Working in the era of MBS, Vision 2030

(21:40) How Saudi manages their relationships with the US and China

(23:51) Sacks on the US-Saudi AI alliance

Thanks to our partners for making this happen!

Solana - Solana is the high performance network powering internet capital markets, payments, and crypto applications. Connect with investors, crypto founders, and entrepreneurs at Solana's global flagship event during Abu Dhabi Finance Week & F1: https://solana.com/breakpoint

IREN - IREN AI Cloud, powered by NVIDIA GPUs, provides the scale, performance, and reliability to accelerate your AI journey. https://iren.com/

Oracle - Step into the future of enterprise productivity at Oracle AI Experience Live. https://www.oracle.com/artificial-intelligence/data-ai-events/

Circle - The America-based company behind USDC — a fully-reserved, enterprise-grade stablecoin at the core of the emerging internet financial system. https://www.circle.com/

BVNK - Building stablecoin-powered financial infrastructure that helps businesses send, store, and spend value instantly, anywhere in the world. https://www.bvnk.com/

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses Saudi Arabia's AI ambitions with guest Tareq Amin, exploring the country's evolution, energy and talent advantages, and its relationships with the US and China. The conversation also touches on Vision 2030 and the AI race in the Middle East. Tareq Amin shares insights on Humain's business and how it works with foundational model providers.

takeaways.text: Saudi Arabia has energy and talent advantages
Humain works with foundational model providers
Saudi Arabia is in an AI race with other Middle Eastern countries
Vision 2030 is a key part of Saudi Arabia's development plan
The US and Saudi Arabia have a complex AI alliance
Tareq Amin is building Humain to be a major AI player
Saudi Arabia must balance relationships with the US and China
The Middle East is becoming a hub for AI development

sentiment.notes: The conversation is generally positive, with a focus on the potential for Saudi Arabia to become a major player in the AI space. However, there are also discussions of the challenges and complexities involved.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of the US-Saudi AI alliance
